ogTitle: Mount Saint Thomas vs Mount Seaview: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Saint Thomas and Mount Seaview.
heading: Mount Saint Thomas vs Mount Seaview — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Saint Thomas, New South Wales and Mount Seaview, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Seaview has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Mount Saint Thomas (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Saint Thomas or Mount Seaview safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Saint Thomas has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Mount Seaview scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Saint Thomas scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Seaview scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Saint Thomas or Mount Seaview?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Seaview has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
